title: Remove default of column collapse across all custom tables
excerpt: It would be great if when you create a custom table within a board that you can collapse selective columns that won’t cause collapse on the main table (and visa versa)

posts.author: kwulster (Kathryn Wulster)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if when you create a custom table within a board that you can collapse selective columns that won’t cause collapse on the main table (and visa versa)

posts.author: Angela137 (Angela Ford)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with this request! I am trying to created tabs from the Main Table in order to work on prioritizing or verifying the tasks are accurate. Each filtered tab needs specific columns and I am disrupting others work when I collapse or expand the columns I need.

posts.author: kelseyotley (Kelsey Otley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would love to see this feature adjustment!

I have many columns on my board and some groups require different column types.

I would love to be able to:

  1. Collapse columns in specific groups that don’t affect other groups
  2. Collapse columns in specific views that don’t affect other views
